DOCTYPE field value for usage statistics documents.
UsageStatisticsInformation - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model.statistics.usage
Metadata describing a usage statistics query, including the reporting period (start and end date) and an optional Solr filter query string used to restrict the statistics data.
UsageStatisticsInformation(String, String, String) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model.statistics.usage.UsageStatisticsInformation
 
UsageStatisticsRecorder - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.statistics.usage
Class to be called on requests to be recorded in usage statistics.
UsageStatisticsRecorder(IDAO, Configuration, String) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.statistics.usage.UsageStatisticsRecorder
Default constructor.
UsageStatisticsResource - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.v1.statistics.usage
REST resource providing usage statistics and access metrics for records and viewer resources, covering a single day or a range of days.
UsageStatisticsResource() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.v1.statistics.usage.UsageStatisticsResource
 
UsageStatisticsResponse - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model.statistics.usage
REST response object for usage statistics requests, containing an aggregated summary and a list of per-date statistics entries that can also be serialized as CSV.
UsageStatisticsResponse(StatisticsSummary, List<StatisticsSummary>) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model.statistics.usage.UsageStatisticsResponse

Represents a TimerTask that periodically updates the session timeout counter to keep the user's session information current.
